# Peijin Zhang - Website

This site presents Peijin Zhang's research profile and selected work in solar radio astronomy, electromagnetic wave propagation, and space weather.

## Primary pages
- Home (English): https://pjzhang.cc/
- Home (Chinese): https://pjzhang.cc/index_ch/
- Solar Radio: https://pjzhang.cc/solarradio/
- Data Processing: https://pjzhang.cc/dataproc/
- Inner Heliosphere: https://pjzhang.cc/innerhelio/
- LOFAR Sun: https://pjzhang.cc/lofarsun/

## Preferred citation targets
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6855-5799
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7j9gGWQAAAAJ&hl=en

## Contact
- peijin.zhang@njit.edu
- peijinzhang8@gmail.com
